mxCell.value: Nivel 3: Componentes | SmartOffice - Aplicacion Spring Boot

object.c4Description: Gestiona el CRUD completo de reservas y salas de juntas.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Consulta disponibilidad y realiza reservas de salas de juntas.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Almacena reservas de salas. Gestionada por Hibernate JPA.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: CRUD de reservas. Valida JWT localmente. Filtra por rol ADMIN/USER. ReservationRequest/Response ReservationRequestMapper
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Exporta reservas en formato iCal. GET /calendar/reservation/{id}.ics GET /calendar/reservations.ics
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Proxea login, register y logout hacia auth-service. POST /auth/login POST /auth/register POST /auth/logout
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Proxea listado de usuarios. Valida rol ADMIN via JWT. GET /users GET /users/email
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: create, findAll, findByUser findById, update, deleteById
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: exportOne(id): String exportAll(): String
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: login, register, logout record AuthResult
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Valida conflictos de horario. Obtiene email via AuthServicePort. Publica email en cola Redis. Implementa ReservationUseCase.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Delega login/register/logout a AuthServicePort. Implementa AuthProxyUseCase.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Factory method create(). Validaciones inline. overlaps() detecta conflictos. Getters/setters de una linea.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Genera iCal RFC 5545. toIcal(Reservation): String toIcal(List, name): String Timezone America/Bogota.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: RuntimeException de dominio. Lanzada cuando hay conflicto de horario en una sala.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: save, findAll, findByCreatedBy findById, findByRoomId deleteById
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: validateToken, extractUsername extractRole, login, register logout, getEmailByUsername getAllUsers
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: publish(to, subject, body) Publica mensaje en cola Redis.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Wiring de puertos y adaptadores. ReservationRepository -> SqlServerReservationAdapter AuthServicePort -> AuthServiceAdapter EmailQueuePort -> RedisEmailQueueAdapter RestTemplate, ObjectMapper, Redis
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Implementa ReservationRepository. Traduce Reservation a ReservationEntity. JpaReservationRepository ReservationEntityMapper
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Implementa AuthServicePort. Llama a auth-service via HTTP. login, register, logout validateToken, extractRole getEmailByUsername, getAllUsers
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Implementa EmailQueuePort. publish() serializa a JSON y hace LPUSH a email_queue.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Cola email_queue (LPUSH). Consumida por email-service.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Implementa EmailLogUseCase. Consume Redis cada 3s (BRPOP). Envia via EmailSenderPort. Guarda log en EmailLogRepository.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Modelo de mensaje de email. to, subject, body. Factory method create().
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Registro de entrega de email. success() / failure() factories. status: SENT / FAILED.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: RuntimeException de dominio. Lanzada cuando falla el envio via Gmail SMTP.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: dequeue(): EmailMessage Consume mensaje de Redis.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: send(EmailMessage): void Envia email via SMTP.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: save(EmailLog): EmailLog findAll(): List<EmailLog>
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Implementa EmailQueuePort. dequeue() hace BRPOP en email_queue.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Implementa EmailSenderPort. Envia via Gmail SMTP TLS :587. Lanza EmailDeliveryException si falla.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Implementa EmailLogRepository. Persiste EmailLog en emaildb. JpaEmailLogRepository EmailLogEntity (@Entity)
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Wiring de puertos y adaptadores. EmailQueuePort -> RedisEmailQueueAdapter EmailSenderPort -> GmailEmailSenderAdapter EmailLogRepository -> SqlServerEmailLogAdapter
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Almacena logs de emails enviados.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Servidor de correo Google. SMTP TLS :587.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: register(username, email, password) returns User
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Implementa LoginUseCase. Verifica credenciales con BCrypt. Genera JWT via TokenPort.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Implementa RegisterUseCase. Hashea password con BCrypt. Publica email bienvenida en Redis.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Factory method create(). Validaciones inline. id, username, email passwordHash, role.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Lanzada cuando las credenciales no coinciden en el login.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Lanzada cuando el username ya existe en el registro.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Login, register, logout. Valida y emite JWT. POST /auth/login POST /auth/register POST /auth/logout GET /auth/validate GET /auth/me
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Lista usuarios registrados. GET /users GET /users/email?username=
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Login y registro de usuarios. Guarda token/role en VaadinSession. Redirige a AdminView o ReservationsView.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Lista y gestiona reservas del usuario. Descarga iCal. Logout con blacklist. BeforeEnterObserver (auth guard).
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Panel admin: todas las reservas. Muestra conteo de usuarios. Solo accesible con rol ADMIN.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Expone feed iCal publico. GET /ical/reservations.ics Llama downloadAllIcs().
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: login, register, logout countUsers, record AuthResult
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: findAll, create, update delete, downloadIcs, downloadAllIcs
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Implementa AuthUseCase. Delega a AuthServicePort. login, register, logout, countUsers.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Implementa ReservationUseCase. Delega a ReservationServicePort.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: login, register, logout countUsers
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: findAll, create, update delete, downloadIcs, downloadAllIcs
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Implementa AuthServicePort. Llama a reservations-demo:8080 /auth/login, /auth/register /auth/logout, /users
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Implementa ReservationServicePort. Llama a reservations-demo:8080 /reservations, /calendar
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Wiring de puertos y adaptadores. AuthServicePort -> AuthServiceAdapter ReservationServicePort -> ReservationServiceAdapter RestTemplate bean
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Genera iCal via CalendarExport. Implementa CalendarUseCase.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Outlook, Google Calendar u otro cliente que consume el feed iCal exportado por SmartOffice.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: findByUsername, existsByUsername save(User): User
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: generateToken, validateToken extractUsername, extractRole blacklist, isBlacklisted
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: sendWelcomeEmail(to, username) Publica en Redis email_queue.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Implementa UserRepository. UserEntity (@Entity) JpaUserRepository
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Implementa TokenPort. Genera y valida JWT HS256. Blacklist en Redis con TTL.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Implementa NotificationPort. @Async LPUSH a email_queue.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Wiring de puertos y adaptadores. UserRepository -> SqlServerUserAdapter TokenPort -> JwtTokenAdapter NotificationPort -> RedisNotificationAdapter DataSeeder: crea admin por defecto
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Almacena usuarios y credenciales.
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: login(username, password) returns LoginResult(token, username, email, role)
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Crea usuario admin por defecto al arrancar si no existe. username: admin / role: ADMIN
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%

object.c4Description: Configura conexion Redis. LettuceConnectionFactory StringRedisTemplate, ObjectMapper
object.label:
%c4Name%
[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]

%c4Description%
